title: ML10X Preset
description: One preset on the Morningstar ML10X loop switcher. Note: the ML10X has no per-preset MIDI-message list (that's an MC-series feature); this schema deliberately omits any `midi_messages` field.

bank.description: Which of the 4 banks this preset lives in (matches the editor's 'Bank 1'..'Bank 4' labels).

number.description: Position within the bank (0 through 127, matching the device's MIDI Program Change numbering).

name.description: Display name shown on the ML10X.

mode.description: Simple vs Advanced preset mode (per the editor's mode toggle).

spillover.description: When the user switches to a different preset, the chosen loop's trail audio continues sounding (provided that loop is bypassed in the next preset). Set per output. 'nothing' is the default.

chain.description: Signal chain: the ordered list of connections the audio signal travels through when this preset is active. Each entry says 'signal goes from <from_connector> to <to_connector>'; setting 'bypass: true' on a hop means the destination loop is skipped (signal passes through as if the loop weren't there). Note: bypass is ignored by the firmware in Advanced mode.
